name: Classic Margarita
description: A tart tequila sour with orange liqueur and a salted rim.

steps.action: Rim a rocks glass with salt.
steps.tip: Use a lime wedge to moisten the rim first.

steps.action: Add tequila, lime juice, and triple sec to a shaker with ice.
Shake hard for 15 seconds until chilled.
Strain into the prepared glass over fresh ice.

name: Paloma
description: A bright tequila highball with grapefruit and lime.

steps.action: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour in tequila and lime juice.
Top with grapefruit soda and a pinch of salt.
Stir gently and garnish with a grapefruit wedge.

name: Moscow Mule
description: A crisp vodka cocktail with ginger beer and lime.

steps.action: Fill a mule mug with ice.
Add vodka and lime juice.
Top with ginger beer and stir gently.
Garnish with mint and a lime wedge.

name: Cosmopolitan
description: A pink vodka cocktail with cranberry and orange notes.

steps.action: Chill a coupe glass.
Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake until very cold.
Double strain into the chilled glass.
steps.tip: Express an orange peel over the surface if available.

name: Espresso Martini
description: A rich vodka cocktail with espresso and coffee liqueur.

steps.action: Chill a martini or coupe glass.
Add all ingredients to a shaker with plenty of ice.
Shake hard until the tin is frosty and the foam builds.
Double strain into the chilled glass.
steps.tip: Three coffee beans make a classic garnish.

name: Gin and Tonic
description: A clean, bitter highball with botanical gin and tonic water.

steps.action: Fill a highball glass with fresh ice.
Pour in the gin.
Top with tonic water and give one gentle stir.
Squeeze in a lime wedge and drop it in.

name: Tom Collins
description: A sparkling gin sour with lemon and soda.

steps.action: Add gin, lemon juice, and simple syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly until chilled.
Strain into a tall glass over fresh ice.
Top with club soda and garnish with a lemon wheel.

name: Negroni
description: A bittersweet stirred cocktail with gin, Campari, and vermouth.

steps.action: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 20 to 25 seconds until chilled and diluted.
Strain over a large cube in a rocks glass.
Express an orange peel over the drink and garnish.

name: Daiquiri
description: A classic rum sour that is crisp, bright, and balanced.

steps.action: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake hard until thoroughly chilled.
Double strain into a chilled coupe.

name: Mojito
description: A minty rum highball with lime and soda.

steps.action: Gently muddle mint leaves with lime juice and simple syrup in a tall glass.
steps.tip: Press lightly so the mint stays bright, not bitter.

steps.action: Add rum and fill the glass with crushed ice.
Top with club soda and stir from the bottom up.
Crown with more crushed ice and a mint bouquet.

name: Mai Tai
description: A layered tiki rum drink with citrus and almond richness.

steps.action: Add aged rum, white rum, curaçao, orgeat, and lime juice to a shaker with crushed ice.
Shake briefly to combine and chill.
Dump the contents into a rocks glass.
Float the dark rum on top and garnish with mint and spent lime shell.

name: Old Fashioned
description: A whiskey classic built on sugar, bitters, and dilution.

steps.action: Add bourbon, simple syrup, and bitters to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir until chilled and slightly diluted.
Strain over a large cube in a rocks glass.
Express an orange peel over the drink and use it as garnish.

name: Whiskey Sour
description: A balanced whiskey sour with lemon and a silky texture.

steps.action: Add all ingredients to a shaker without ice and dry shake.
steps.tip: Dry shaking first helps build a stable foam.

steps.action: Add ice and shake again until chilled.
Double strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Top with a few drops of bitters if desired.

name: Boulevardier
description: A whiskey variation on the Negroni with depth and spice.

steps.action: Add all ingredients to a mixing glass with ice.
Stir until chilled and glossy.
Strain into a chilled coupe or over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with an expressed orange peel.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: A non-alcoholic mint cooler with lime and soda.

steps.action: Gently muddle mint leaves with lime juice and simple syrup in a tall glass.
Fill the glass with crushed ice.
Top with club soda and stir lightly.
Garnish with fresh mint and a lime wheel.

name: Shirley Temple
description: A sweet non-alcoholic soda drink with grenadine and citrus.

steps.action: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add grenadine and lime juice.
Top with ginger ale and stir gently.
Garnish with a cherry.
